channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Canopy pole vandalised, 23rd May
item.description:
Large black spray graffiti tags on the grey metal pole holding up the glass canopy in the middle of the paved island in front of the Crooked Billet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Do these parking spaces belong to anyone?, 23rd May
item.description:
We have 5 parking bays at the bottom of willinghall close who do they belong to ?

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tha glass shelter has been smashed again, 23rd May
item.description:
The glass panel at the bus shelter has been smashed again. It was already vandalised last week and I believe only yesterday (Friday 22/05/26) new glass panel was installed. This morning (Saturday 23/05/26) is smashed again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Near 125 castlehaven road, 23rd May
item.description:
Broken glass on floor. Plenty of pets and children nearby

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 123B, Castlehaven Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter left along river front, 23rd May
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 172, Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 23rd May
item.description:
Again at

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenham Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tipping frequent at garages, 23rd May
item.description:
More rubbish dumped at the garages - this is frequently occurring

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmcroft Road, Goddington, Greater London

item.title: Toy left on street, 23rd May
item.description:
Been here a while

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fallen tree, 23rd May
item.description:
Tree has fallen and is partially in the road. Idiots keep parking directly opposite it making it awkward for other motorists to pass. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daly Drive, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped stuff at end of Birkbeck place, 23rd May
item.description:
Yes another load of stuff dumped. Looks like they’ve emptied the boot. Includes a car battery

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lovelace Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tress and Shrubbery require puining, 23rd May
item.description:
Clearly me cry for years without any attn. Cutting back required

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Street, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley in pond, 23rd May
item.description:
Abandoned trolley in pond

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kebab shop waste bags dumped on pavement, 23rd May
item.description:
Rubbish bags from take-away food shops are left unprotected on the pavements. Foxes then rip the bags open & leave a horrible smelly mess every morning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped cannisters, 23rd May
item.description:
Lower section if Anchor & Hope Lane. 4 large cannisters dumped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Derrick Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Abandoned scooter in location ///bonds.shapes.plug

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnehurst Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London

item.title: Bushes need pruning, 23rd May
item.description:
The bushes here and make it impossible to use this little path as they need cutting back and tidying it looks a complete mess often full of rubbish but it needs tidying up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low hanging tree, 23rd May
item.description:
This tree is so low hanging now you have to duck to get under it and I am not particularly tall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mickleham Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double bed mattress flytipped, 23rd May
item.description:
Double bed mattress has been flytipped along the footpath between Wellan Close and Westwood Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Rochester Way, Blackfen, Greater London
